texto: The leaves of the trees will stroke your cheeks, The wind will blow through your chest and cleanse your soul, The magical sounds of the earth, animals and the elements will hug your ears, The positive vibrations of the earth will fall asleep next to your heart and the breathtaking beauty of the earth will ease your mind. If you allow it, the earth, in itself, will heal you.
explicacao: Citação de Julia McCann sobre vínculos afetivos e cuidado mútuo. “The leaves of the trees will stroke your cheeks, The wind will blow through your chest and cleans…” articula espiritualidade, death, healing em registro de espiritualidade, com relevância para contextos como luto e healing.
